summary: Iteration 5 testing complete: All 4 new feature requests verified. Backend: GET /api/health returns healthy, POST /api/financings/{id}/pay-custom accepts {valor} and updates financing, POST /api/goals/{id}/contribute supports negative values for withdrawal (saque). Frontend: Dashboard Due Cards (Vencidos/Vencendo/Futuro) are clickable and open modals with transaction lists, Saldo Total card is clickable and opens modal with account breakdown, Metas Financeiras section has Aporte and Sacar buttons, Investimentos page title shows 'Investimentos e Financiamentos', Investimentos page has Metas Financeiras section with goals/aporte/saque, Resgate button appears on investment cards with valor > 0, Sidebar shows 'Invest. e Financ.' instead of 'Investimentos', TransactionModal for despesa shows 'Financiamento' category option when financings exist, selecting Financiamento shows financing selector dropdown.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions during initial render - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality
Console warnings about missing aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement opportunity

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health - returns healthy status with database connected
Backend: POST /api/financings/{id}/pay-custom - accepts {valor} and updates valor_pago, parcela_atual, status
Backend: POST /api/goals/{id}/contribute - supports positive values (aporte) and negative values (saque/withdrawal)
Backend: Goal withdrawal floors at 0 (cannot go negative)
Frontend: Dashboard - Vencidos card is clickable and opens modal with 'Contas Vencidas' title
Frontend: Dashboard - Vencendo card is clickable and opens modal with 'Contas Vencendo Hoje' title
Frontend: Dashboard - Futuro card is clickable and opens modal with 'Contas Futuras (7 dias)' title
Frontend: Dashboard - Saldo Total card is clickable and opens modal with 'Composicao do Saldo Total' showing Receitas, Despesas, and Total
Frontend: Dashboard - Metas Financeiras section has 'Aporte' button with data-testid='goal-aporte-{id}'
Frontend: Dashboard - Metas Financeiras section has 'Sacar' button with data-testid='goal-saque-{id}' (when valor_atual > 0)
Frontend: Investimentos page title shows 'Investimentos e Financiamentos'
Frontend: Investimentos page has Metas Financeiras section with goals
Frontend: Investimentos page has 'Nova Meta' button with data-testid='new-goal-btn'
Frontend: Investimentos page has 'Resgate' button on investment cards (when valor > 0) with data-testid='resgate-btn-{id}'
Frontend: Sidebar shows 'Invest. e Financ.' instead of 'Investimentos'
Frontend: TransactionModal for despesa shows 'Financiamento' category option (value='__financing__') when financings exist
Frontend: Selecting 'Financiamento' category shows financing selector dropdown with data-testid='tx-modal-financing'
critical_code_review_comments: data-testid attributes properly implemented for all new interactive elements
Backend pay-custom endpoint correctly updates financing state
Goal contribute endpoint correctly handles negative values with floor at 0
TransactionModal correctly shows Financiamento option only when financings exist
Resgate button correctly shows only when investment valor > 0
seed_data_creation: Created test user with financing (Test Financing), goal (Test Goal), category (Alimentacao), and investment (Test Investment for Resgate) for testing - all cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 verified all 4 new feature requests: (1) Dashboard cards clickable with modals, Saldo Total clickable with breakdown, Metas with saque option; (2) Investimentos page has Metas section + Resgate button; (3) TransactionModal shows Financiamento category with financing selector; (4) Sidebar renamed to 'Invest. e Financ.'. Key data-testid attributes: goal-aporte-{id}, goal-saque-{id}, new-goal-btn, goal-card-{id}, resgate-btn-{id}, tx-modal-financing, tx-modal-categoria (includes __financing__ option). Backend endpoints: POST /api/financings/{id}/pay-custom accepts {valor}, POST /api/goals/{id}/contribute accepts negative values for withdrawal.

business_rules_verified.due_cards_clickable: VERIFIED - Vencidos/Vencendo/Futuro cards open modals with transaction lists
business_rules_verified.saldo_total_clickable: VERIFIED - Opens modal showing Receitas, Despesas, Contas Bancarias, Investimentos, and Total
business_rules_verified.metas_saque_option: VERIFIED - Sacar button appears when goal valor_atual > 0
business_rules_verified.investimentos_metas_section: VERIFIED - Metas Financeiras section with goals, aporte, and saque
business_rules_verified.resgate_button: VERIFIED - Appears on investment cards when valor > 0
business_rules_verified.sidebar_renamed: VERIFIED - Shows 'Invest. e Financ.' instead of 'Investimentos'
business_rules_verified.financiamento_category: VERIFIED - Shows in despesa category dropdown when financings exist
business_rules_verified.financing_selector: VERIFIED - Appears when Financiamento category is selected
business_rules_verified.pay_custom_endpoint: VERIFIED - POST /api/financings/{id}/pay-custom updates valor_pago and parcela_atual
business_rules_verified.goal_negative_contribute: VERIFIED - POST /api/goals/{id}/contribute accepts negative values for withdrawal with floor at 0
